codeReview.summary: Reviewed the typechecker and regression tests for generic associated constructors outside impl contexts. The implementation stores impl generic context, infers concrete bindings from constructor arguments, and instantiates the returned nominal type in the bare-result case covered by the new tests. I did not find any high-confidence actionable correctness bugs in scope.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the handoff, diff, transcript skeleton, compiler-worker skill, mission guidance, and the touched code/tests. The fix appears to correctly address generic associated constructor inference outside impl contexts, and I found no high-confidence actionable issues.
